---
title: "Open Science Dashboard"
subtitle: "Searchable Dashboard with Examples and Templates to Accelerate Adoption of Open Science Workflow"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: tip.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
---

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
     Open Science Tip Card
     Tips are loaded from _code/tips.yaml at render time via
     the R chunk below, then passed to JS as window.OSTIPS.
     The site base URL is injected into a <meta> tag so that
     tips-card.js can resolve image paths absolutely — robust
     regardless of where in the site the card is rendered.
     ============================================================ -->
```

```{r load-tips, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(yaml)
library(jsonlite)

tips_raw  <- yaml::read_yaml("_code/tips.yaml")
tips_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(tips_raw$tips, auto_unbox = TRUE)

# Read site-url from _quarto.yml for robust image path resolution.
# %||% is the null-coalescing operator — defined inline to avoid
# adding an rlang dependency just for this one use.
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a) && nzchar(a)) a else b

quarto_cfg <- yaml::read_yaml("_quarto.yml")
site_url   <- (quarto_cfg$website[["site-url"]] %||%
               quarto_cfg[["site-url"]]         %||%
               "")
site_url   <- sub("/$", "", site_url)   # strip any trailing slash
```

```{=html}
<!-- site-url injected at render time so JS can build absolute image paths -->
<meta name="ostip-base-url" content="`r site_url`">
<script>
// Tips data injected at render time from _code/tips.yaml
window.OSTIPS = `r tips_json`;
</script>
```

<!-- ── Tip Card HTML ──────────────────────────────────────── -->

```{=html}
<div class="open-sci-tip-wrapper">

  <p class="tip-section-label">✨ Open Science Tip</p>

  <div class="tip-card" id="os-tip-card" data-category="">

    <!-- Category badge -->
    <div class="tip-category-badge">
      <span>💡</span><span>Open Science</span>
    </div>

    <!-- Header: name + optional thumbnail -->
    <div class="tip-header">
      <h3 class="tip-name">Loading tip…</h3>
      <img class="tip-thumb" src="" alt="" style="display:none;" />
    </div>

    <!-- Tip text -->
    <p class="tip-text"></p>

    <!-- Footer: learn more link + controls -->
    <div class="tip-footer">
      <a class="tip-learn-link" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="tip-link-label">Learn more</span>
        <span class="tip-arrow-icon">→</span>
      </a>

      <div class="tip-controls">
        <button class="tip-btn" id="tip-btn-prev" title="Previous tip">← Prev</button>
        <span class="tip-counter" id="tip-counter">— / —</span>
        <button class="tip-btn" id="tip-btn-next" title="Next tip">Next →</button>
        <button class="tip-btn" id="tip-btn-shuffle" title="Shuffle tips">🔀</button>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /.tip-card -->

  <!-- Submit link — points to tips_contribute.qmd and GitHub issue form -->
  <p class="tip-submit-row">
    Got a tip to share?
    <a href="content/tips_contribute.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Learn how to contribute</a>
    or
    <a href="https://github.com/YOUR-ORG/YOUR-REPO/issues/new?template=submit-a-tip.yml"
       target="_blank" rel="noopener">submit directly via GitHub →</a>
  </p>

</div><!-- /.open-sci-tip-wrapper -->

<!-- Load the tip card JS -->
<script src="_code/tips-card.js"></script>
```

[![](content/images/dashboard-click-here-button.png){width="409"}](https://shannonrankin.github.io/open-science-dashboard/content/dashboard.html)
